title: Admin dashboard (sales metrics, revenue chart, top-selling products)
description: Dashboard with sales metrics and charts, revenue reporting by period, and top-selling products analytics.

inScope: Stats cards: total sales, orders, customers, revenue
outOfScope: Exportable/scheduled reports beyond the CSV export in Order Management

acceptanceCriteria.text: Dashboard shows current totals for sales, orders, customers, and revenue
Admin can view a revenue chart filtered by date range
Admin can see the top-selling products for the selected period
